text:
Zoff is a Japanese eyewear brand that held a collaboration with the Hunter × Hunter series.

Information

The first collaboration ran from October 19th, 2022, to November 23rd, 2022.

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss
Killua Zoldyck
Kurapika
Leorio Paradinight
Chrollo Lucilfer
Hisoka Morow
